title: ChatStack
description: Stack duplicate messages on top of eachother
body:
# ChatStack
ChatStack stacks chat messages with a nice format automatically to make a large number of the same messages easier to read.

![Mod working](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baa91b686d553db1dc0617029e71e04cd5c3226f_0.webp)

## Features
- Message Stacking
- Stacked message numbering
- Stacked count coloring

## Supported Versions
| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.21.x  | ✅         |
| 1.20.x  | ✅         |
| 1.19.x  | ✅         |
| 1.18.x  | ✅         |
| 1.17.x  | ✅         |
| 1.16.x  | ✅         |

# Installation
- Install fabric for any supported version
- Put the mod in your mods folder.
